summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SepulangDinas SaaS platform. Backend APIs working well (80% success rate), frontend authentication and UI fully functional. All core features operational including Input Logbook, Generator Laporan, Rekap, Billing, and Support pages.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for CREATE operations
minor_bugs.impact: Functionality works correctly, only status code convention issue

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with Google OAuth button
Authentication system working with session tokens
Dashboard loads successfully with authenticated users
All navigation pages accessible (Input Logbook, Generator, Rekap, Billing, Support)
Patient selection modal opens and works
Generator Laporan page with tabs functional
Rekap Logbook page displays logbook data correctly
CRUD operations for patients, logbooks, and tickets work
Admin endpoints correctly restrict access (403 for non-admin)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor backend status code fixes: Update CREATE endpoints (/api/patients, /api/logbooks, /api/tickets) to return 201 status code instead of 200 for REST API compliance
